sigma.title: Csc.EXE Execution Form Potentially Suspicious Parent
Potential Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dnx.EXE
Visual Basic Command Line Compiler Usage
Suspicious Filename with Embedded Base64 Commands

osquery.name: t1027_004_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1027_004_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery_matches.name: t1027_004_proc_hidden
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

promotion.reason: S3 Silver (Linux Docker sandbox): 6 direct run(s) ran successfully, raw telemetry available, Sigma detection not confirmed (0/8 rules matched, 1 osquery).
